sessionStart.bash: for base in "$PWD" "$PWD/examples/vscode-copilot-layout"; do if [ -x "$base/.copilot-hooks/session-start.sh" ]; then cd "$base" && exec bash ./.copilot-hooks/session-start.sh; fi; done; echo '{"continue":true}'

postToolUse.bash: for base in "$PWD" "$PWD/examples/vscode-copilot-layout"; do if [ -x "$base/.copilot-hooks/post-tool-audit.sh" ]; then cd "$base" && exec bash ./.copilot-hooks/post-tool-audit.sh; fi; done; echo '{"continue":true}'
